summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the new Quick Select Common Areas feature for the muscle map. All functionality working perfectly as designed.
passed_tests: Quick Select panel opens when clicking the header
Quick Select shows exactly 6 preset buttons as expected
All preset buttons have correct names: Upper Back Tension, Lower Back Pain, Desk Worker, Runner Recovery, Shoulder Issues, Full Back
Clicking Upper Back Tension preset adds 8 markers to appropriate muscle areas
Clicking Lower Back Pain preset adds 10 markers to appropriate muscle areas
Clicking Shoulder Issues preset adds 8 markers to appropriate muscle areas
Preset buttons toggle correctly - clicking again removes the markers
Feedback toast shows correct number of markers added for each preset
Marked Areas list updates correctly showing all added markers with muscle names
Markers are placed at muscle centroids as expected
Switching between Anterior/Posterior views works correctly
Gender toggle (Male/Female) switches body images correctly
Presets work correctly for both male and female bodies
Clear All Markers button clears preset markers as well
Quick Select panel is collapsible with proper chevron indicator
All preset combinations work as designed (Upper Back: 8, Lower Back: 10, Shoulder: 8 markers)
